---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new privacy-first runtime feature
title: "Feature: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Goal

What should the user be able to do?

## Data classes touched

- [ ] Level 0: Public
- [ ] Level 1: Low-risk app data
- [ ] Level 2: Contextual private data
- [ ] Level 3: Highly private data
- [ ] Level 4: Restricted sensitive data

## Action risk

- [ ] Read
- [ ] Prepare
- [ ] Execute
- [ ] Destructive
- [ ] External share

## Privacy design

How is context minimized? Is approval required?

## Validation

What tests or docs must change?
